description: Generate Tableau .twb/.twbx workbooks: 47 tools for charts, dashboards, rules, CSV pipelines.

cmd.description: Install twilize with the optional `pipeline` extra (CSV->Hyper) so csv_to_dashboard works out of the box.

name: io.github.subhatta123/twilize

environmentVariables.description: Force unbuffered stdout so MCP stdio framing is never delayed by Python buffering.
environmentVariables.name: PYTHONUNBUFFERED

environmentVariables.description: Force UTF-8 stdio so non-ASCII content in workbooks survives the round trip.
environmentVariables.name: PYTHONIOENCODING

environmentVariables.description: Server log level. One of: debug, info, warning, error, critical.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables AI-assisted chart suggestions and reference-image styling.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

runtimeArguments.description: Install twilize with the optional `pipeline` extra (CSV->Hyper) so csv_to_dashboard works out of the box.

title: Twilize
